arcPlan.title: The Hidden Route

sourceHook.title: The Tithe
sourceHook.premise: A frontier settlement is three Resonants short of its annual tithe to the Synod.
sourceHook.crucible: The Synod will take children if the numbers are not met.

scenarioShape.premise: The shortfall exposes an evacuation route moving Resonants out before official assessment.
scenarioShape.whyThisRun: The hook's numbers become symptoms of a survival network, not just an audit problem.
scenarioShape.whatThisIsNot: This is not a paper-trail hearing in a room with every authority already present.

arcPlan.arcQuestion: Will the Warden expose, capture, protect, or co-opt the hidden route?
arcPlan.coreCrucible: Protecting children may require falsifying the very order the Warden serves.
invariantFacts: The settlement is short three Resonants.
The Synod can trigger supplementary selection.
variableTruthsForThisRun: The missing three are connected to an evacuation route.

pressureEngines.name: Supplementary selection
pressureEngines.advancesWhen: the Synod records a usable candidate
pressureEngines.visibleSymptoms: assessment windows and transit deadlines tighten

pressureEngines.name: Hidden route
pressureEngines.slowsWhen: the Warden earns enough trust to coordinate
pressureEngines.visibleSymptoms: children and adults vanish into prepared gaps

playerStanceAxes.ifAHardens: the route treats the Warden as possible shield
playerStanceAxes.ifBHardens: the route treats the Warden as hunter

chapterFunctionMap.pressureQuestion: What does the Warden think the shortfall is?
Who now treats the Warden as shield or hunter?
Which authority does the Warden spend?
